title: DSA for Placement: Complete Interview Preparation
textbook_refs: Narasimha Karumanchi: Data Structures and Algorithms Made Easy
Aziz, Lee, Prakash: Elements of Programming Interviews

topics.title: Matrix Problems: Spiral Order, Rotation, Flood Fill, and Word Search
String Hashing: Polynomial Rolling Hash and Anti-Hash Techniques
Number Theory: GCD, LCM, Modular Arithmetic, and Euler's Totient
Sieve of Eratosthenes: Prime Generation and Segmented Sieve
Mathematics for Coding Interviews: Combinatorics, Pigeonhole, and Probability
Advanced Stack Problems: Largest Rectangle in Histogram, Stock Span, and Next Greater Element
Advanced Queue Problems: First Non-Repeating Character and Sliding Window with Deque
Advanced Linked List: Merge K Sorted Lists, Flatten Multi-Level, and Copy with Random Pointer
Advanced Binary Tree Problems: LCA, Diameter, Max Path Sum, and Serialize/Deserialize
Dynamic Programming on Trees: Subtree DP, Maximum Independent Set, and Tree Diameter
LCA Algorithms: Binary Lifting, Euler Tour + Sparse Table, and Farach-Colton-Bender
Advanced Graph Algorithms: Bridges, Articulation Points, and Biconnected Components
Strongly Connected Components: Kosaraju's and Tarjan's Algorithms with Applications
Euler Path and Hamiltonian Cycle: Hierholzer's Algorithm and Ore's Theorem
Floyd-Warshall Algorithm: All-Pairs Shortest Path and Transitive Closure
DP on Strings: Edit Distance, LCS, Palindrome Partitioning, and Regular Expression
Knapsack Problem Variations: 0/1 Knapsack, Unbounded, Fractional, and Multiple Knapsack
DP on Grids: Unique Paths, Minimum Path Sum, Dungeon Game, and Cherry Pickup
Matrix Chain Multiplication and Interval DP: Burst Balloons, Palindrome Removal
Bitmask DP: Travelling Salesman, Assignment Problem, and SOS (Sum over Subsets)
Digit DP: Count Numbers with Digit Constraints and Digit Sum Problems
Aho–Corasick Algorithm: Multi-Pattern Search and Dictionary Matching
Z-Algorithm: Linear Preprocessing for Pattern Matching Applications
Manacher's Algorithm: Longest Palindromic Substring in O(n)
Suffix Arrays: SA-IS Construction, LCP Array, and Applications
Square Root Decomposition: Range Queries, Block Preprocessing, and Mo's Algorithm
Sparse Table: O(1) RMQ, Static Range Queries, and Disjoint Sparse Table
Heavy-Light Decomposition: Path Queries and Updates on Trees
Centroid Decomposition: Distance Problems, Path Counting, and Centroid Tree
Treap and Implicit Key Treap: Split, Merge, and Sequence Operations
Persistent Segment Tree: Versioned Updates and K-th Order Statistics
Convex Hull Trick and Li Chao Tree: DP Optimization Techniques
Divide and Conquer DP Optimization: Opt-Monotone DP and SMAWK Algorithm
Game Theory: Nim, Sprague-Grundy Theorem, and Combinatorial Games
FFT and NTT: Polynomial Multiplication, Convolution, and Number Theoretic Transform
XOR Tricks and Bit Manipulation Patterns: XOR Basis, Maximum XOR Subarray
Meet in the Middle: Divide-and-Enumerate and Birthday Attack Applications
2-SAT: Implication Graph, SCC-Based Solution, and Applications
Offline Algorithms: Mo's Algorithm, CDQ Divide and Conquer, and Offline LCT
System Design for Interviews: LRU Cache, LFU Cache, and Consistent Hashing
Competitive Programming Patterns: Template Code, I/O Optimization, and Problem Taxonomy
Top Interview Patterns: Two Pointers, Backtracking, BFS/DFS Templates
FAANG Problem Patterns: Amazon, Google, Microsoft, and Meta Common Topics
Mock Interview Problems: Curated Set from Real Company Interviews
Placement Guide: Resume Tips, Coding Round Strategy, and Negotiation
